name: @usedot/loom
description: Provider-pluggable orchestration runtime for multi-model inference pipelines.

scripts.demo: node src/cli.mjs run "Review this API route for privacy and billing bugs." --pipeline code-review --config examples/mock.config.json
scripts.test: node src/cli.mjs run "Find edge cases in a credits API." --pipeline code-review --config examples/mock.config.json --json
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm --prefix studio run build
